name: Surfers Coffee
tagline: Non-profit coffee shop run by Surfing The Nations — great espresso with an even better mission.
talkStory: Surfing The Nations has done humanitarian work across the Pacific — tsunami relief, youth outreach in underserved communities, surf therapy programs. Every cup you buy funds something real. The vibe is warm and community-oriented. This is the perfect pit stop if you're driving between Honolulu and the North Shore — Wahiawa is dead center. Fill up on caffeine before hitting the beaches.
